liberty.summary:
Liberty Classical Update - week of May 3-7, 2026

Action Items
- Sullivan / Liberty Thunder: Division 2 schedule updated 5/7 - check portal.gridironfb.com for next game time.
- Sat 5/9 Flag Football moved to Stillwater Middle School fields (523 Marsh St W). Last day to order media packages.
- Mon 5/11: FACTS auto-pay $340 hits Wells Fargo *5475 (Jameson baseball fees).
- Jameson WBL Rec Baseball - download SportsEngine app, search team 'ROMANS'. Picture Day Sat 5/16 at WBLHS, Lane 2, photo time 11:50 AM (no cleats). First game Tue 5/13 6 PM, Lakewood Hills #3. Uniform: white pants, belt, shirt tucked.
- Midterm progress reports posted for Jameson and Sullivan (FACTS link, active 2 weeks).
- Sun 5/17 5 PM: last day to nominate Liberty for 'Best of the Press' (presspubs.com/bestof).

Teacher Notes
- Mrs. Thompson (5th/Jameson): math grades dropped class-wide on fractions and 2-digit division. No one under 70% yet but a few close. Bring math books home daily.
- Mrs. Stasny (3rd/Sullivan): spelling words getting harder. Last sight-word week is tricky - practice at home.
- Ms. Lanz (3rd music): end-of-year music party Mon 5/11 - Wizard of Oz movie + candy. Reply to opt out of candy.
- Mrs. Heagle: corrected May newsletter posted with accurate dates.

Upcoming Events
- Mon 5/11: 3rd grade music party + FACTS payment
- Tue 5/13: Jameson baseball, 6 PM, Lakewood Hills #3
- Fri-Sat 5/16: 'Into the Woods Jr.' (1:30 + 5:30 PM) + WBL baseball Picture Day + Flag Football regular season
- Sun 5/17: Best of the Press nominations close
- Mon 5/18: Volunteer Appreciation Breakfast (RSVP)
- Sat 5/30: Flag Football League Tournament, Stillwater HS Turf

General Updates
- Last month of school underway.
- Summer parades: Hugo 6/6, WBL Manitou Days 6/19 (sign up if interested).
- Summer Bass Junior fishing league forming (grades 3-8 fall) - Mr. Simonson collecting names.
- Lion Tales April newsletter out: Speech Meet recap, spring concert, Level 7 State Champion gymnast.
